records.descriptionTemplate: {Frenzied Slash} increases Base DMG by 33%. While in Depressed Persona, the Arithmetica Cost of corresponding Cards is reduced by an additional 1; while in Manic Persona, the number of hits is increased by additional 1.
{Symbiotic Aberration} generates 2 more Aliemus. In Depressed state, inflict Weakness on all enemies for 1 turn; in Manic state, inflict Vulnerable on all enemies for 1 turn.
At turn end, "24" obtains 10 Aliemus. Each time "24" releases Exalt, the Aliemus obtained from this effect in battle +1.
Obtain 24 Realm Mastery. The next Command Card of "24" will be effective 3 times.
{Rouse} {Mediating Personalities} is enhanced: The Persona Effect Bonus of "24"'s Command Cards is doubled; this effect expires after "24" unleashes Exalt each turn.
{Reluctant Alms} reduces the Arithmetica Cost of the highest-cost Card in hand by 1 for this turn.
"Basic Strike" and "Basic Defense" triggers 10% {Poison} on all enemies.
{Colorless Spiral} increases Base DMG by 50%, and playing it grants {Embryo Fusion} +20%.
Draw 2 Command Cards from Agrippa that are not Strike or Defense. Reduce the Arithmetica Cost of 2 such cards by 1 this turn.
{Rouse} {Path of the Lost} is enhanced: Each time Agrippa inflicts or triggers {Poison}, Shield Generation at turn end +50%. This effect stacks up to 5.
For each stack of Vulnerable state on the target of "Strike," {Embryo Fusion} +5%, up to 30%.
For each Vulnerable stack on the target, the Final DMG of {Decomposition} +5%, up to 500%.
Whenever you {Devour}, put {A Small Wish} from the Discard Pile into hand and set its Arithmetica Cost to 0.
All Awakeners' DMG +25% this turn.
{Rouse} {Stagnant Curse} is enhanced: After Agis unleashes Exalt, her next "Defense" takes effect 3 times.
{Combat Stance} is considered "Defense".
{Endless Justice} Draw quantity +1.
{Endless Justice} grants Alva a 50% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG.
Add 1 {Combat Stance} and {Precision Slash} with {Exhaust} to your hand. Alva's Crit. DMG in this battle +25%.
{Rouse} {Outstanding Veteran} is enhanced: The first time Alva's Command Card deals DMG each turn, gain Shield equal to 40% DEF.
{Power of Friendship} allows you to draw 1 additional card.
{Gland Division} and {Clamorous Ocean} increase Base DMG by 100%, dealing {Pierce DMG}.
"Basic Defense" draws 1 card. Every 3 turns, add 1 {Gland Division} with {Exhaust} and {Fleeting}.
Grants an additional 24% ATK {STR} and {Tentacle DMG}. For the next 5 times {Gland Division} is played, draw 1 Card.
{Rouse} {Self-Proliferation} is enhanced: Aurita's "Strike" deals {Pierce DMG} and triggers 2 additional instances of DMG.
{Shattered Halberd} grants [Arg1] Aliemus. (effect scales with {Shattered Halberd} skill level)
{Protective Scales} Shield Generation 20% and gains {Retain}.
Heal HP equal to 7.5% of CON at turn end.
One Tentacle attacks 5 times, obtaining a 25% {Counter} to DMG dealt.
{Rouse} {Metamorphosed Body} is enhanced: After Caecus plays a card, 1 Tentacle performs an attack and gains {Counter} equal to 50% of DMG dealt.
For every card {Poof!} shuffled in, the Sorcerer gains 3 Aliemus.
{Magic Carnival} draws an additional card. Drawing a Symptom or State card also deals 1 instance of DMG to a random enemy.
{Telekinesis} gains {Aftershock}: Shuffle 1 "Insight" into the Draw Pile.
This Exalt's DMG instance ×2. The following 5 Casiah Command Cards grant {STR} equal to 8% Casiah's ATK.
{Rouse} {Opening Act} is enhanced: Whenever any Awakener plays "Strike," Casiah's {Opening Act} is triggered, generating Temporary {STR}.
At the start of the battle, place 1 {Onyx Plume} into hand.
For every {Onyx Plume} in hand, playing {Stygian Wings} grants 5 Aliemus. For every {Onyx Plume} you play, the Arithmetica Cost of {Umbral Flight} -1 this turn.
For every 3 {Onyx Plume} you play, obtain 1 Arithmetica and increase Castor's Final DMG by 10% in this battle.

Add 3 additional {Onyx Plume} to your hand. This turn, increase the amount of Shield {Retained} by {Onyx Plume} by 10% of Castor's DEF, and each time you play an {Onyx Plume} card, additionally inflict Castor's ATK*140% stacks of {Corrosion}.
{Rouse} {Skybound Oath} is enhanced: Castor's first {Onyx Plume} each turn inflicts {Cleansing Feathers} {Corrosion} on all enemies. {Corrosion} removal DMG: 300% → 500%.
{Everlasting Phantasm} is {Retained}, and the healing effect +20%.
{Tintless Dream} retains for each turn; the next time it is played, it will restore an additional amount of HP equal to [Arg1]% of CON (the effect increases with the level of {Tintless Dream}).
{Undying Bird of Paradise} triggers {Revival}, and all Awakeners obtain 25 Aliemus and can apply the {Revival} effect again after an interval of 6 turns.
Place 3 {Tintless Dream} cards that boost healing by 50% into hand and attach {Exhaust}.

{Rouse} {Power of Blessing} is enhanced: When triggers resurrect of {Undying Bird of Paradise}, immediately gain Temporary {Tentacle DMG} equal to 150% of Celeste's ATK. This effect doubles in Boss Battles.
Obtain 5 stacks of {Symbiosis} when the battle begins. Base DMG of {Lifeform Reconstruction} +20%.

{Lifeform Reconstruction} additionally gains 200% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen as Keyflare. For each stack of {Symbiosis} removed, Clementine's Base DMG +3%. At the end of each battle, Clementine's Base DMG +25%.
At turn end, obtain 2 stacks of {Symbiosis}. The stacking limit for {Symbiosis}, {Psychic Trauma}, and {Phobic Fixation} is increased to 15.

Gain {STR} equal to 50% of Clementine's ATK and Keyflare equivalent to 300% of Clementine's Keyflare Regen. Removing {Symbiosis} simultaneously triggers the effects of {Psychic Trauma} and {Phobic Fixation}.
{Rouse} {Call of Shaggai} is enhanced: DMG instances dealt by Clementine +1, and the {Symbiosis} cap increases to 20.
"Basic Strike" and "Basic Defense" gain 5 Aliemus, and obtain {Aftershock}: the next Aliemus gained from playing a card +5, stacking up to 2 times.
{Ominous Semaphore} inflicts Weakness on all enemies for 1 Turn. For each Tentacle present, {Pilot}'s Shield, Strength, and {Tentacle DMG} increase by 5%, up to 50%.
{To Sail the Sundered Tides} makes all enemies Vulnerable for 1 turn, increases Temporary Crit. DMG by 20%, and each time {Death Resistance} is triggered in this battle, it further +10%.
Obtain 3 Tentacles. The discarded card {Aftershock} Effect triggers an additional time.
{Rouse} {Sunken in the Profound} is enhanced: The first {Lightning Retribution} and {Ominous Semaphore} Corposant plays each turn place 1 additional {Pilot} into hand. {Pilot} effect +50%.
"Basic Strike" enjoys 2x {STR} bonus and gains {Leap}: Obtain 1 Arithmetica. "Basic Defense" grants {STR} equal to [Arg1]% of ATK and gains {Leap}: Obtain 1 Arithmetica.
When Daffodil kills an enemy by any means, the team's Crit. Rate is permanently increased by 5% for this stage.
Each time an "Insight" card is played, Daffodil gains 2 Aliemus and Strength equal to 1% of ATK, with a maximum of 5 triggers per turn.
Additionally, place 2 copies of "Thousand Mirage" into hand, increasing the Base DMG of {Skull Reaver} by 50% in this battle.
{Rouse} {Dimensional Projection} is enhanced: When played, immediately generate 1 Temporary {Skull Reaver} with 0 Arithmetica Cost and place it into {Ultra Space}.
{Outer Surgery} increases the number of Weakness turns by 1 and increases Heal amount by 33%.
{Equivalent Exchange} increases Base HP recovery and discard HP recovery effects by 20%. For each card discarded, an additional amount of HP is recovered and an equal amount of shield is obtained.
{Rationality, Truth, and Reality} Healing +25%, and the Aliemus Regen also benefits Doll.
At turn start, restore HP equal to [Arg1]% of Doll's CON, lasting for 3 turns. (effect scales with {Rationality, Truth, and Reality} skill level).
{Rouse} {Flesh Detached} is enhanced: Doll's "Strike" and "Defense" now also generate Shield.
For every 1% Crit. DMG Doresain and his equipped WoD & Covenant have, increase his Crit. Rate by 0.1%.
For every 1% HP missing, Doresain's Command Cards' Base DMG, Shield, and Aliemus +1%.
"Evernight's Revel" Base DMG further +300%. Each time played, this turn's subsequent"Evernight's Revel" enjoy an additional 100% {STR} bonus.
The Crit. Rate of this Exalt further +25%, the Final DMG of this Exalt +100%.

{Rouse} {Crimson Invite} is enhanced: When played, immediately deal {Fixed DMG} equal to 20% of current HP to all enemies. After Doresain's first kill each turn, deal {Fixed DMG} equal to the overflow DMG to all other enemies.
{Unleash: Mecha} places 1 "Basic Strike" with {Exhaust} into hand, and {Retract: Mecha} places 1 "Basic Defense" with {Exhaust} into hand.
{Electromagnetic Blast} enjoys an additional 1x {STR} and {Alert} Buff.
{Function Overload} {Leap}: Has both DMG and Shield effects.
{Electromagnetic Blast} Base DMG and Shield Generation by 50%. Erica's "Basic Strike" deals an additional 1 instance of DMG, and "Basic Defense" grants an additional 1 Shield, lasting for 3 Turns.
{Rouse} {Parameter Fitting} is enhanced: After Erica unleashes Exalt, her Exalt additionaly enjoys a 1x {STR} and {Alert} bonuses.
"Basic Strike" deals DMG twice and grants Temporary {Counter} equal to 50% of DMG dealt.
"Basic Defense" Shield Generation +25% and grants {Counter} equal to the amount of Shield.
Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, deal 100% {Counter} {Fixed DMG} to front row enemies. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered in this battle, increase {Fixed DMG} by 25%.
Temporarily reduces all enemies' {STR⯆} by [Arg1]% of their DEF (scales with {Cradle of Stars} level up).
{Rouse} {Boundless Starlight} is enhanced: When played, immediately and permanently {Steal} {STR} equal to 20% of ATK from all enemies.
{Ocean of Elation} enjoys 100% more {Tentacle DMG} bonus.
"Basic Strike" and "Basic Defense" allow 1 Tentacle to attack once, but only deal 50% DMG.
At turn end, for each card in hand, trigger 3% {Poison} on all enemies and gain 3 Aliemus.
Hand Limit +2. At turn end, choose 1 card to {Retain} and reduce its Arithmetica Cost by 1 for 3 turns.
{Rouse} {Abyssal Obsession} is enhanced: After Faros plays a card, Tentacles inflict {Poison} equal to 3% of {Tentacle DMG} generated this turn, up to 3 times.
"{Self-Destruct} Transformation" applies 1 turn of Vulnerable to all enemies when {Elation} is chosen, and applies 1 turn of Weakness to all enemies when "Curse" is chosen.

{Terminal of Truth and Abyss} and {Fate's Descent} increase the Base {Poison} amount by 50%, with an additional 15% increase for each stack of {Finale}. The stacking cap for {Finale} stacks has been removed.
"Strike" and "Defense" additionally generate Aliemus equal to 5% of Doll: Inferno's Base Aliemus. The {Fixed DMG} of {Illusion's End} is increased from 25% to 30%, and additionally heals 30% lost HP.

This Exalt provides 2x Aliemus, and all Awakeners' {Poison}, {Counter}, and Base DMG increase by 10%. In Boss Battles, obtain an additional stack of {Finale}. {Finale Form}: For every 10 Aliemus consumed, trigger an additional 3% {Poison} on all enemies.
{Rouse} {Soulblight} is enhanced: Each stack of {Finale} increases team DMG Amplification by 8%, and {Illusion's End} grants all Awakeners 30% Base Aliemus.
"Basic Strike" grants "Helot: Catena" a temporary 15% increase in Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG. "Basic Defense" triggers 15% {Bleed} stacks on all enemies.
{Hatred Unleashed}: If HP is below 50%, the Strength obtained is doubled. The {Prepare} Effect of {Bloodthirsty Flail} is changed to {Prepare 2}.
At the start of the battle, add 1 {Irregular Form: Chains} to your hand. {Sanguine Fetters} breaks the target's shield and prevents the target from obtaining Shield for 1 turn.
"Helot: Catena" Crit. DMG +35%. Temporary hand limit +2. Add 1 {Hatred Unleashed} and {Crimson Shackles} to hand, reducing their Arithmetica Cost by 1.

{Rouse} {Reaper's Declaration} is enhanced: After Helot: Catena unleashes Exalt, grant each different Command Card of hers in hand 35 stacks of {Temporary Enhance}, removed at turn end or after being played.
Gain 1 stack of {Negentropy} at turn end.
Each time you use a Posse, Ramona: Timeworn gains +25% Temporary Crit. Rate and Temporary Crit. DMG.
Exalt {Paradox Converged}: Choose any unlocked Posse to replace the current one. It will be restored after use or at the end of the battle.
Obtain 3 stacks of {Negentropy}, ignore the stacks limit. Reduce the Arithmetica Cost of copied cards to 0.
{Rouse} {Entropy Undone} is enhanced: The limit on activations per turn is removed.
{Decapitation Damage} gains a Strength buff that doubles for each Tentacle.
{Law of the Strongest}: Aside from removing {STR} from all enemies, gain the same amount Temporary {STR}.
{Abyssal Depths' Power} grants Goliath 25% Temporary Crit. Rate when choosing {Usurp}, or 25 Aliemus when choosing {Dormancy}.

When choosing {Usurp}, the Base DMG of {Blade's Dominion} placed in hand +400%, and its Arithmetica Cost becomes 0. When choosing {Dormancy}, do not place {Blade's Dominion}; instead, add 2 copies of {Decapitation Damage} to your hand, granting them the effects of {Exhaust}, {Prepare 1}, and {Retain}.
{Rouse} {Preemptive Revenge} is enhanced: Goliath gains an additional 300% {STR} Bonus while in {Raging Waves} stance.
"Basic Strike" and "Basic Defense" obtain Temporary {STR} equivalent to 10% of ATK. If either {Rondino} or {Crescendo} are triggered, the obtained Temporary {STR} is doubled.
{Rondino} reduces the Arithmetica Cost of granted cards by 2.

After triggering the {Melody} effect or playing the {Symphony of Harmony}, Hameln gains 1% Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG. For every 10 triggers, the number of DMG instances of {Soul Overture} and {Primal Chord} +1 in this battle, up to 3 times.
Each time DMG is dealt, randomly apply 1 {Marvelous Debuff} to the target. Choose 1 additional card when adding {Rondino}.

{Rouse} {Laudable Masterpiece} is enhanced: At turn start, for every 1 Command Card with {Rondino} or {Crescendo}, Hameln gains 5 Aliemus. When Hameln unleashes Exalt, for every 2 Command Cards with {Rondino} or {Crescendo}, deal +1 hit.
At the start of the battle, place 1 {Irregular Form} into hand.
"Basic Defense" grants Helot 25% Temporary Crit. Rate.
"Strike" grants Helot 5% Crit. DMG.
Temporarily increase hand limit by 2, add 2 {Irregular Form} to hand, and Helot gains 25% Crit. DMG.
{Rouse} {Vengeance Upon Thee} is enhanced: Upon playing, the Strike Bonus of {Shattering Strike} and the Base DMG of {Lasting Loathe} +50%.

{Snarl Psalm}: Applies 1 stack of {Vulnerable} to all enemies.
{Elegy Psalm}: Applies 1 stack of {Weakness} to all enemies.
Horla's Psalms gain {Retain}.

Each time the first "Psalm" is played in a turn, Horla gains 10 Aliemus.
Enhance the bonus effect corresponding to the current {Emotion} state when using {Resplendent Chapters} from 150% to 250%.

Further increase the {Emotion} state bonus effect to 600%. Obtain 3 stacks of universal {Metaphor}, which can be treated as a {Metaphor} of any {Emotion}. Universal {Metaphor} takes priority for being consumed when a {Leap} effect is triggered.

{Rouse} {Prelude Verse} is enhanced: After triggering {Annihilation}, Horla's next Command Card played this turn will {Leap}. Whenever Horla consumes ≥ 3 stacks of {Metaphor}, current {Emotion}'s effect +25% temporarily (cannot stack).
For each use of {Get 'em! Brown!} in this battle, the Base DMG of {Swarm Impact} +[Arg1]% of ATK (effect scales with {Get 'em! Brown!} skill level).
"Basic Defense" draws 2 cards; if they are not Jenkin's, discard them.
{Mistborn Street Urchin} grants 1 extra {Get 'em! Brown!}
Place 1 {Ultimate Assemble!} with {Exhaust} into hand.
{Rouse} {Spatial Fold} is enhanced: Jenkin enjoys 2× the Crit. DMG effect of {Spatial Fold} and {Mistborn Street Urchin}.
{Silent Fealty} maximum stack count increased to 3.
"The {Toad Stew}'s {Poison} and HP Recovery effects +25%."

{Marvelous Cuisine} has a 50% chance to trigger a random Marvelous Effect, including gaining 10 Aliemus for self, granting 5 Aliemus to allies, making all enemies Vulnerable for 1 turn, inflicting Weakness on all enemies for 1 turn, drawing 1 card, or obtaining 200 Keyflare.
Shuffle 1 {Marvelous Cuisine} into the Draw Pile and Discard Pile respectively.
{Rouse} {Dance of the Gibbous Moon} is enhanced: At turn end, if Karen's Command Card is {Retained}, trigger HP Recovery and Aliemus Generation effects twice.
"Strike" and "Defense" cards' Basic DMG, Shield, and Aliemus generated +50%.
When {Solarflare} has 3 stacks of {Fiamma}, its Base DMG +50%. When {Last Stand Salvo} has 3 stacks of {Fiamma}, gain additional {STR} equal to 3% Kathigu-Ra's ATK.
At the start of the battle, apply 1 stack of {Fiamma} to all Kathigu-Ra's Default Command Cards. For each stack of {Combust} gained, Kathigu-Ra's Base DMG +5% for this battle.
Deal 2 additional instances of DMG, and instead randomly apply 5 stacks of {Fiamma} to the Kathigu-Ra's Command Cards in hand.
{Rouse} {Karmic Embers} is enhanced: The Final DMG and {STR} effects of each stack of {Fiamma} +30%.
{Pain and Pleasure} deals {Pierce DMG}, Obtain {Retain}.
{Pain of Unfulfilled Desires} Obtain 10 Aliemus.
When {Flatterer's Embrace} triggers {Devour}, the obtained Strength is doubled.
Obtain 100% more {STR}, and all Awakener gain a 10% increase in Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG.
{Rouse} {Sanguivore} is enhanced: After Leigh plays a card, her next Exalt is enhanced: gain Temporary {STR} equal to 10% of Permanent {STR}. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
When your current HP is below 50%, {Forbidden Swamp} gains an additional shield, and the {Poison} effect is doubled.
{Strike to Protect} {Prepare 1} upgraded to {Prepare 2}, Base DMG and Crit. Rate increased by 20%.
At turn start, obtain {Endure} equal to 10% Max HP. {Undying Flower Upon Slime} and {Strike to Protect} only remove half of the {Endure}.
Increase {Endure} Limit by 100% for this battle, granting {Endure} equal to Max HP. Add 2 {Strike to Protect} cards with additional {Exhaust} to your hand.

{Rouse} {Slime Convergence} is enhanced: after Exalt, each attack taken this turn make the next {Strike to Protect} consumes and converts 40% more {Endure} stacks into effect. This effect stacks up to 5.
{Corrupted Flames} will upgrade to {Deadly Flames} if it remains in the hand or {Ultra Space} at turn end.
"Basic Strike" gains {Leap}: Applies 50% DMG as {Poison}; "Basic Defense" gains {Leap}: Triggers 25% {Poison} on all enemies.
{Dance to Destruction}: Draw 1 card for every 2 cards discarded.
Upgrade all {Green Flames} and {Corrupted Flames} in your hand to {Deadly Flames}. For 3 turns, at turn start, this effect will repeat once.
{Rouse} {Emerald Reflection} is enhanced: For every 3 instances of DMG dealt by Liz, her DMG in this battle is permanently increased by 15% of her ATK.
{Blade of Defiance} is considered as "Strike." Lotan's Base Strike DMG +30%.
{Tides of Hubris} is considered as "Strike," and the Strength obtained is doubled.
{Beast of Chaos} increases the number of DMG instances by 1, and additionally places 2 "Basic Strike" cards with added {Exhaust} and {Fleeting} into hand.
Deal an additional {Fixed DMG} equal to 15% of the target's Max HP to all enemies. The Base DMG of {Beast of Chaos} +100% for this battle.
{Rouse} {Battle Thirst} is enhanced: After Lotan plays "Defense," the next {Blade of Defiance} played this turn activates 2 times.
{Exalted Pyre} temporarily increases Temporary Crit. DMG by 15% of Miryam's Base Crit. DMG.
{The Chosen One} increases Realm Mastery by 20 points, gains {Prepare 1} and {Retain}.
{Ritual} effect +30%. For each {Sacrament} converted into {Obsession}, increase Miryam's Base DMG and the Base {Poison} of {Pray to the Abyss} by 15% in this battle.
Additionally places 2 copies of {Sacrament} into hand, increasing the Tentacle Limit and Tentacle Count by +1.
{Rouse} {Testament of Faith} is enhanced: For every 2 {Sacrament} cards flipped, place 1 {Divine Realm's Illusion} into hand.

For every 1% {Death Resistance} Mouchette and her equipped WoD & Covenant have, her Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG + 0.15%. Each time {Death Resistance} is triggered, the Crit. DMG provided by {Mist Realm Traveler} +100% for this battle.
{Mortal Blast} generates 1 temporary copy of the last played other "Strike" and makes its Arithmetica Cost -1.
{Shining☆Tornado} grants Mouchette +1 hits count this turn.

{Over-Exalt}: Hits count +1; for each {Death Resistance} triggered this battle, +1 additional hit.
Set the Arithmetica Cost of the next {Shining☆Crush} to 0. First release each battle additionally inflicts {Fainted} on all enemies.

{Rouse} {Mist Realm Vestige} is enhanced: When played, immediately generate 2 Temporary {Mortal Blast} cards with 0 Arithmetica Cost. Mouchette's Talent "Dramatic Encounter" trigger limit per turn increases to 5.
{Vortex Reversed} is {Retained}. For every 2 Tentacles, deal an additional instance of DMG.

"Basic Strike" grants {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg1]% of Murphy's ATK, while "Basic Defense" grants {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg2]% of Murphy's ATK (effects scale with "Strike" and "Defense" skill levels).
At turn end, Murphy obtains 5 Aliemus. After releasing the Posse, remove 2% Max HP's {Sacrifice}.
At turn start, obtain a Shield equal to 60% DEF and {Tentacle DMG} equal to 10% ATK, generating 2 temporary Tentacles that last for 3 turns.
{Rouse} {Made Into Being} is enhanced: Murphy's first {Vortex Reversed} played each turn deals ×2 hits; her first {Divine Maiden's Birth} played each turn generates ×2 Arithmetica.
{Waltz of Lemuria} {Tentacle DMG}, Shield Generation, and Final DMG +10%, with an additional 0.2% increase for each point of Keyflare Regen Level.
Murphy: Fauxborn's Crit. Rate +3% per Tentacle. Murphy: Fauxborn's Crit. DMG +3% per 1% Max HP value of {Sacrifice} or {Delayed Sacrifice} stacks.
Draw 1 {Abyss Hymns} when "Strike" or "Defense" is used. Takes effect once per turn.
Inflict +5 stacks of {Birth Ritual}. Generate 3 {Waltz of Lemuria} with 2 Arithmetica Cost, with {Prepare} and {Exhaust}.
{Rouse} {Tidal Sacrament} is enhanced: When played, immediately gain 2 stacks of {Life Seal}. If in the {Surging Tides} stance at turn end, gain 1 additional stack of {Life Seal}.
"Basic Strike" gains {Counter} equal to [Arg1]% of ATK.
{No Trespassing} Obtain {Prepare 1}.
Increases {Fixed DMG} of {Ready and Set} by 50%. After release, gain Immune to {Fragile}, Weakness, and Vulnerable for 1 turn.
Current Shield +50%, ignore the Shield Limit. Increases {Fixed DMG} against all enemies to 500% of {Counter}.
{Rouse} {Maintenance Expert} is enhanced: All Awakeners' Fixed {Counter} +25%.
{Knell of Death} {Poison} dealt +100% and grants Shield equal to [Arg1]% of DEF (effect scales with {Knell of Death} skill level).
{Midnight Tide} DMG +33%. The first 3 Symptom Cards played each turn increase {Midnight Tide} DMG by 10% of ATK for the rest of the battle.
After releasing {Passage of the Ego}, in this battle, the number of {Poison} stacks applied by {Passage of the Ego} +[Arg1]% of ATK (the effect scales with the level of {Passage of the Ego}).
Increases the {Poison} effect caused by Nymphaea by 50% for 3 turns.
{Rouse} {Drowning in Sorrow} is enhanced: At turn end, {Poison} inflicted by Nymphaea additionally +25%.
{Piercing Strike} inflicts +1 turn of Vulnerable; Base DMG by +100%; enjoys +100% {STR} bonus.
{Seven Arts and Virtues} increases shield by 20%. If the character is in a {Fragile} state, {Seven Arts and Virtues} grants an additional 33% shield.
{Unstable Barrier} Shield +28% and grants {STR} equal to [Arg1]% of ATK (effect scales with {Unstable Barrier} skill level).
Shield gain increased by 200%, Ogier's DMG instances +1, lasting 3 turns.
{Rouse} {Knight's Zeal} is enhanced: If {Death Resistance} has been triggered this battle, Ogier's Exalt generates 3 times the Temporary {STR} instead.
"Basic Strike" gains a Temporary {Counter} equal to 50% of DMG. "Basic Defense" gains {Counter} equivalent to [Arg1]% of ATK.
{Wax-Hot Desire} gains 20 Aliemus.
{Honey-Colored Tragedy} doubles Base DMG and grants a {Counter} equal to [Arg1]% of ATK.
Inflict "Vulnerable" on all enemies before dealing DMG. Obtain {Counter} equal to [Arg1]% of ATK.
{Rouse} {Give and Take} is enhanced: When Pandia gains Permanent {Counter}, gain {STR} equal to 3% of that value.
"Strike" or "Defense" draws 1 "Skill" from deployed Awakeners, takes effect up to 1 time per turn.
The Painted {Orisons} are upgraded to {Advanced Orisons}, and the Painted {Silver Relics} are upgraded to {Golden Relics}.
After Pickman consumes {Creativity}, he additionally gains 50 Aliemus, and can use Exalt 2 times this turn.
Gain 1 stack of {Fantasia} and additionally {Discover} 1 time.
{Rouse} {Morgue Studio} is enhanced: The duration of the Painted Golden Relic created by {Lifelike Rendition} increases from 1 turn to 2 turns.
At the start of the battle, put 1 {Sacred Heart} into your hand.

For each card in hand, "Strike" and "Defense" generate +1 Aliemus.
For each {Sacred Heart} played, the Arithmetica Cost of the next {Cleansing Judgement} -1.
When {Exhausted} at its {ordinal:3rd} use, {Sacred Heart} causes Pollux's next Command Card to take effect 1 additional time.
In this turn, all Pollux Command Cards gain +50% {Atonement by Pain} effect; his next Command Card takes effect 1 more time. Place 1 more {Sacred Heart} into hand.

{Rouse} {Path of Ablution} is enhanced: Make {Sacred Heart} inflict 100% DMG as {Bleed}. When a {Sacred Heart} is played and shuffled back, make that card cost 0 Arithmetica an additionally inflict 100% DMG as {Bleed} this turn.

{Queen's Sword} deals +1 instance of DMG and gains Temporary {STR} equal to [Arg1]% of ATK with each DMG dealt. (effect scales with {Queen's Sword} skill level). When discarded, obtain an equal amount of Keyflare.
{Assault Thesis} grants an additional 35 Keyflare Regen for every 1 Arithmetica Cost of each drawn card
After releasing the Posse, Ramona's Temporary Crit. Rate + 50%. {Mundus Decree} shuffles 1 "Insight" into the Draw Pile.
Apply {Weakness} and {Vulnerable} to all enemies for 1 turn. The next released Posse will take effect 2 times.
{Rouse} {First Doctrine} is enhanced: Each activation increases Ramona's Base DMG by an additional 10%.
{Unexpected Gain} will also reduce the Arithmetica Cost of the chosen Card by an additional 1 if a {Critical Hit} occurs. {Showdown} grants Ryker an additional 3 Aliemus for every {Critical Hit}.

Obtain 15 Black Sigils at the start of the exploration. For every 1% of Sigil Yield attribute Ryker has, the amount of Black Sigil obtained in this way +1%, and it will also increase the progress of {Winner Takes All}.

For every 1 Black Sigil consumed, increase the Base DMG of {All-in!} by 0.5% for this exploration. Ryker's "Base Strike" and "Base Defense" can consume 3 Black Sigils and activate twice when Arithmetica is insufficient.
{All-in!} deals 3 instances DMG and reduces the Arithmetica Cost of drawn Cards by 1.
